All clean — 1324 tests pass, 0 failures, lint passes with no errors.

Here's a summary of the changes:

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/shared/types/evaluation.ts:565` | Added `cloudMode?: boolean` to `IEvaluationOptions` |
| `src/api/routes/evaluation.ts:56` | Passes `cloudMode: this.cloudMode` into evaluation options |
| `src/shared/evaluation/engine.ts:1007-1028` | LOC guard after context identification — rejects repos >1M LOC in cloud mode, configurable via `MAX_REPO_LOC` env var, fail-safe on malformed cloc output |
| `frontend/src/lib/error-messages.ts:89-98` | Friendly "Repository Too Large" error message for the frontend |

input.command:
rtk git add src/shared/types/evaluation.ts src/api/routes/evaluation.ts src/shared/evaluation/engine.ts frontend/src/lib/error-messages.ts && rtk git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Block evaluation of repos exceeding 1M LOC in cloud mode

Adds a guard after context identification that rejects repositories
exceeding 1,000,000 lines of code when running in cloud mode. Leverages
existing cloc output, configurable via MAX_REPO_LOC env var, and
fail-safe on malformed cloc data. Local/CLI usage is unaffected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
